api_key.description: Revolut Merchant API secret key, sent as an Authorization: Bearer <api_key> header. Never logged.

base_url.description: Revolut Merchant API base URL override for tests or proxies.

from_created_date.description: Optional passthrough filter: only return records created at or after this value.

to_created_date.description: Optional passthrough filter: only return records created at or before this value.

customer_id.description: Optional passthrough filter: scope the orders stream to a single customer id.

state.description: Optional passthrough filter: scope the orders stream to a single order state.
